texts.full_text: regulation requires businesses serving customers with menu items containing calorie information to display it for all patrons. This ruling affects food-serving establishments nationwide, including those offering coffee which studies show could lower MS risks significantly.. February 27th marks two key events: the GAMC's inaugural Legislative Day and Mondelez International divesting from their Japanese joint venture in pursuit of future growth opportunities February 27, 2015 WASHINGTON, Feb. 26, 2015 /PRNewswire-USNewswire/ -- Drinking coffee may be associated with a lower risk of developing multiple sclerosis (MS), according to a study released today that will be presented at the American Academy of Neurology's 67 th Annual...
